title: FizzBuzz
prompt: Write a Hemlock program that prints the numbers from 1 to 20. For multiples of 3, print "Fizz" instead. For multiples of 5, print "Buzz" instead. For multiples of both 3 and 5, print "FizzBuzz" instead.
expected_output:
1
2
Fizz
4
Buzz
Fizz
7
8
Fizz
Buzz
11
Fizz
13
14
FizzBuzz
16
17
Fizz
19
Buzz
